stemHtml: International Air Services Transit Agreement – The First Freedom of the Air defined in the International Air Services Transit Agreement is the..

options.a: privilege to operate a commercial flight with passengers on board between two States.
options.b: right to land for a technical stop in another State.
options.c: right to carry passengers from the State in which the aircraft is registered an other State.
options.d: right to overfly another State without landing.
